reviews.review_msg: Extremely tricky tests, hard to get high marks. Midterms are 50 minutes each, but most of people cannot finish all. Tests are out of 22, counts 17% of your final grade, almost 1:1. There are two MC questions, 2 marks each, but answers are a-e, have to select all correct answers to get full marks, avoid him if you dont need to take this course.

tests are complete nonsense, says he won't curve but more than 70% of the class can't even pass his midterms. Absolute joke of a course with the way he writes exams for it nothing he teaches is ever on it but rather full of niche random super specific questions. If u want a decent grade do not take this course with this prof

His exams are BRUTALLY RANDOM. He expects students to have a mastery of the entire concept and that would barely get you a passing grade. literally zero way to study for his exams. he givess practice midterms. but his real exam is completely different. I get he doesn't give us exact replicas. but give us SOMETHING CLOSE! its not fair at all! AVOID!

He doesn't even know how his students should study for his own exams because they r so over the place. Don't bother with any practice midterms or lectures. best u could do is try to understand the homework but even then you'll probably fail his exams. Ur completely in the dark for what the exams might test, if you want a will live avoid this prof.

Provides engaging lecture, clearly cares about students. That being said, I'm not a big fan of his exam style as the wording is often very confusing and they're EXTREMELY time constrained. The assignments are also very redundant and lengthy, and not particularly useful for preparing for the exams. Great professor but hard to get good marks.

Okay so during lectures he goes over important statistic theory... which is good... but it all ends there. Exams are nothing at all like what you would expect. over 70% of the classes failed the midterm... He puts very niche and just pointless questions on the exam which dont make sense. He's passionate abt stats but the tests are just so strange.

The exams are nonsense; he won't curve, but more than 70% of the class can't even pass his midterms!! Absolute joke of a course, nothing he teaches is ever on the exams, but rather full of niche, random, super-specific questions that test no meaningful learning. If you want a decent grade, do not take this course with him
Poorly designed exams and boring assignments. Barely any material to prepare for the niche and specific questions. Assignments are assigned late regularly.

Extremely tricky tests, hard to get high marks. Midterms are 50 minutes each, but most of people cannot finish all. Tests are out of 22, counts 17% of your final grade, almost 1:1. There are two MC questions, 2 marks each, but answers are a-e, have to select all correct answers to get full marks, avoid him if you dont need to take this course.
His grading scheme is too strict and weird.
"There are 2 kinds of people in the world. Those that can infer from missing information..."
